item.title: RT @chatgpt21: @kimmonismus It is lol he’s a European meme page who makes fun of European VC culture

item.title:
RT @compliantvc: Just spoke with dozens of European VCs

item.description:

They all agreed: AI is over
No one is putting money into AI startups anymore
Ope…

item.title: The quality of your thinking is a multiplier for the amount of progress you make at each iteration. ...
item.author: @fchollet

item.title: Honored to announce we are partnering with Jim Liu to port over his wildly popular skills for infogr...
item.description:
Honored to announce we are partnering with Jim Liu to port over his wildly popular skills for infographics and design to work best in Hermes Agent using our native tooling!
The first skill ported today, the Infographic Skill, is available after updating hermes.
Just start a new chat and type `/baoyu-infographic <topic>` to get started! Recommended image generation model is Nano Banana.
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 47 | 🔁 3 | 💬 6 | 👁 1634
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title: You cannot think your way to a perfect design. Only building and testing, over many iterations, can ...
item.author: @fchollet

item.title: Dario is wrong. He knows absolutely nothing about the effects of technological revolutions on the la...
item.description:
Dario is wrong. He knows absolutely nothing about the effects of technological revolutions on the labor market. Don't listen to him, Sam, Yoshua, Geoff, or me on this topic. Listen to economists who have spent their career studying this, like @Ph_Aghion , @erikbryn , @DAcemogluMIT , @amcafee , @davidautor
--- @ylecun | ❤️ 545 | 🔁 76 | 💬 68 | 👁 30438
